title: Gossamer Threads
content:
I feel like cutting my finger,
    hiding upside down
    clinking a canteen
    shelling peas along the floor.

    From the focal point above
    anything could be.
    Light dripping upon
    forlorn gossamer spreads
    like a balloon.


    Merely the vantage point
    of a perspective
    quietly threading.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "Gossamer Threads", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
